title: Silence nether portal
description: Removes the endless Nether portal whoosh for a calmer gameplay experience.
body:
Step into the Nether 🌌 without the constant whoosh in your ears. This resource pack removes the ambient Nether portal sounds 🔇, making your gameplay calmer 😌 and less distracting. The portal will still function normally — teleportation and visuals remain untouched ✨ — but the endless ambient noise is gone.

This pack is perfect if you want a quieter base 🏡, or if you often build near portals and can’t stand the background noise.

**Features:**

Removes the **ambient portal sound**

Works from **Minecraft 1.16 up to 1.21+**

Lightweight and simple ⚡ — just drop it in your resource packs folder 📂


Created **By AmirMiner 🛠️**
